site.title: Makurama
site.description: Makurama is a collection of changing video essays inspired by Sei Shonagon.
site.intro_quote: Persistent rain on the last day of the year.
site.license_note: Code, interface, documentation, schema, and tools are MIT licensed. Videos, voice, subtitles, images, and artistic data are CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 unless stated otherwise.
site.text_fallback: Makurama can be browsed as a plain list of video essays. Each entry is prepared for captions and transcripts as the project grows.

ui.load_error: The video list could not be loaded. Use the text version below.
ui.gallery_empty: No video essays match this tag.
ui.notes_unavailable: Version notes are not available yet.

tags.label: Things I like
tags.description: Small attachments, bright preferences, and private pleasures.

tags.label: Fresh feelings
tags.description: Moments that arrive before they can be explained.

tags.label: Things that pass by
tags.description: Views from transit, thresholds, and passing weather.

tags.label: City murmurs
tags.description: Low urban sound, overheard systems, and public waiting.

tags.label: Private corners
tags.description: Rooms, shelves, surfaces, and small domestic arrangements.

tags.label: Quiet arrangements
tags.description: Objects and habits that make a room hold together.

tags.label: Things that make the heart beat faster
tags.description: Anticipation, embarrassment, delight, and sudden alertness.

videos.title: Mornings
videos.subtitle: Pale kitchen light before speech
videos.description: A short list of pale kitchen sounds, small lamps, and the first messages left unread.
videos.alt: A low resolution morning interior still, reserved as placeholder artwork.

versions.label: PAL version 1
versions.notes: First arrangement, built from iPod footage and a soft chiptune line.

videos.title: Commuting
videos.subtitle: Windows, rails, and announcements
videos.description: Windows, station tiles, delay announcements, and things that briefly become scenery.
videos.alt: A low resolution transit still, reserved as placeholder artwork.

versions.label: PAL version 1
versions.notes: Initial public transport cut with voice and platform room tone.

versions.label: Station edit
versions.notes: Placeholder for a later edit with more station tile footage.
versions.transcript: Transcript placeholder for the station edit of Commuting.

videos.title: Small Rooms
videos.subtitle: A shelf, a corner, a screen reflection
videos.description: Corners, shelf dust, reflected screens, and the comfort of a room that is almost too narrow.
videos.alt: A low resolution room corner still, reserved as placeholder artwork.

versions.label: PAL version 1
versions.notes: First room study, quiet voice and almost no movement.

videos.title: Things That Make the Heart Beat Faster
videos.subtitle: A list of sudden inner weather
videos.description: A changing list of tiny shocks: a message preview, a corridor voice, a hand nearly touching another hand.
videos.alt: A low resolution red-accented still, reserved as placeholder artwork.

versions.label: List draft
versions.notes: Placeholder first version for a list-form essay.
versions.transcript: Transcript placeholder for Things That Make the Heart Beat Faster.
